PHASE:        Phase 8 Batch 2 Item 4 SS-1 SHIPPED (local main only — push pending user confirmation) — Events Export Route Handler squash-merged to main as commit 0171309. First per-entity export endpoint live: /api/exports/events GET handler with manual auth, upload rate-limit tier, 10001-take overflow → HTTP 413, sha256 filterHash, CSV/PDF branches, DATA_EXPORT audit. UI buttons on /events page. SS-2 (Patrols), SS-3 (Alert Rules), SS-4 (Notifications + Alert History) remain. Prior same-day: SS-0 Export Foundation (commit 4caa449), Alert History Log (commit 7da0cab), Notification.patrolId FK (commit 895fa84).

LAST_DONE:    Phase 8 Batch 2 Item 4 SS-1 — Events Export. Squash-merged from feat/exports-events to local main (commit 0171309). NOT pushed to origin yet (awaiting user confirmation). Feature branch feat/exports-events NOT deleted (CLAUDE.md "NEVER run destructive git commands... branch -D unless user explicitly requests"); user can clean up with `git branch -D feat/exports-events`.
              Files added (apps/web/src/app/api/exports/events/):
              - `route.ts`: GET Route Handler with `// Non-tRPC: manual auth required` header (security.md L11). Flow: requireRouteAuth() → rateLimiters.upload.check(userId) (20/min) → eventListFilters.safeParse(state+priority from query) → prisma.tenant.findUniqueOrThrow for slug+name → prisma.event.findMany with `take: 10001` for overflow detection → HTTP 413 JSON if length > 10000 → flatten to typed EventRow (10 columns: id, serial, title, state, priority, eventType.display+category, reportedByName, reportedAt ISO, createdAt ISO) → sha256 filterHash from sorted-keys JSON.stringify(filters) → branch on format=csv|pdf → toCsv() or renderExportPdf() → writeExportAudit() AFTER success with filterHash + rowCount → NextResponse with Content-Type/Content-Disposition/Cache-Control: no-store. PDF Buffer wrapped in Uint8Array for NextResponse.
              - `__tests__/route.test.ts`: 6 tests — CSV byte-level BOM (verify 0xEF 0xBB 0xBF on the wire via arrayBuffer() because Response.text() strips BOM per Fetch spec) + tenant-scoped findMany, PDF content-type, 401 missing session, 413 when findMany returns 10001 rows + no audit row written, DATA_EXPORT audit shape with 64-char-hex filterHash + changesJson={format,rowCount}, state+priority filter propagation into prisma.where. Mocks @/server/auth, @marine-guardian/db (event/tenant/auditLog), @react-pdf/renderer's renderToBuffer (spread retains the React components needed by export-pdf.tsx at module-load).

              Files added (apps/web/src/lib/):
              - `exports.ts`: `buildExportUrl(entity, filters, format)` URL builder — typed ExportEntity ("events" | "patrols" | "alert-rules" | "notifications" | "alert-history") + ExportFormat ("csv" | "pdf") unions; URLSearchParams assembly, drops undefined/null/empty values.

              Files modified:
              - `apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/event.ts`: extracted `eventListFilters = z.object({state, priority})` as a new top-level export. `eventRouter.list` now uses `eventListFilters.extend({cursor, limit})` for its input. Single source of truth — Route Handler imports + reuses the same Zod schema. SS-2/3/4 routers will follow this pattern (patrolListFilters, alertRuleListFilters, etc.).
              - `apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/events/page.tsx`: added imports for Button (@/components/ui/button) and buildExportUrl (@/lib/exports). Restructured the header right-side into a flex container holding the existing stats display + a new 2-button group. Export CSV and Export PDF rendered as `<Button asChild variant="outline" size="sm">` wrapping `<a href={buildExportUrl("events", {}, format)} download>...</a>`.
              - `docs/CHANGELOG_AI.md`: new SS-1 entry prepended above SS-0.
              - `docs/IMPLEMENTATION_MAP.md`: Last updated line refreshed; new ### Exports (Phase 8 Batch 2 Item 4 — IN PROGRESS) subsection with SS-0 + SS-1 checked, SS-2/3/4 unchecked; Next Step section rewritten to reflect current accurate backlog (SS-2/3/4 + real-time SSE; alert-history + patrolId FK marked shipped in the "Shipped since" list).
              - `.cline/memory/lessons.md`: new 🟡 fix entry — "Response.text() strips UTF-8 BOM during decoding — assert BOM via arrayBuffer()" — documents the Whatwg Encoding spec behavior so SS-2/3/4 test authors don't repeat the discovery cost.

              Schema/migrations: none — SS-1 is application code only.

              Acceptance gate (all GREEN):
              - typecheck 6/6 packages clean
              - lint 5/5 packages clean (after 3 small fixes: eslint-disable on the @react-pdf/renderer spread, `String(i)` for numeric template literal in the 10001-row fixture, tightened summarizeFilters parameter type from Record<string, unknown> to Record<string, string | number | undefined>)
              - tests: 60/60 in apps/web (was 54 — added 6 events route handler tests) + 7/7 in packages/jobs (cached, unchanged) = 67 total

              Per the documented hook-injection thrashing lesson, stayed Opus-direct throughout. Hook injection still firing this session (~10× vercel-plugin "next-forge" / "next-cache-components" / "nextjs" / "vercel-functions" suggestions on Read+Write; ~6× context-mode observation pointers; ~3× claude-mem timeline pointers). Opus 4.7 absorbs them cleanly. Token usage ~50K — within the 60K SAFE feedback-memory threshold, well under the 100K Opus ceiling per §2.5b.

              Plan deviations (3, all minor): (a) Plan said `eventRouter.list` accepts state/eventTypeId/priority/dateFrom/dateTo/search — actual schema is only state+priority (plus pagination), so Route Handler mirrors the real schema. (b) Plan said `<Link href={buildExportUrl(...)}>` for buttons — switched to `<a download>` because Next.js Link doesn't honor the download attribute (the plan's own rationale a few lines later says "Native `<a download href=...>` button"). (c) `requireRouteAuth()` takes no req parameter (SS-0 established this — Auth.js v5 reads request context automatically).
